name: Dak's Olive Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Better for Bread (R) white flour
1 cup Whole, pitted black olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the machine's browning control to light.
2. Add all the ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting and start the machine.
